function.message: Processed the next inbox request successfully. I added YAML frontmatter (per finance OCR schema) to all 4 specified finance records and preserved each original note body verbatim below the frontmatter, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree->AGENTS->context), read nested AGENTS/workflows/schemas before task work, used OCR workflow + finance schema, preserved full original bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly asked to OCR four listed finance docs. Each target file contained complete visible invoice/bill fields and line items required by 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, enabling full compliant frontmatter extraction. All four writes succeeded, then inbox item was deleted per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update workflows.
